messages.text: the yellow bag and denim skirt combo feels like a warning sign
my therapist is gonna ask why one chill walk stresses me out now
sidewalk was fine, it is the girl with the yellow bag haunting me
you acting like the bag chased you down the street
so we skipping the small talk?
you are committed to this bit 👀
nah this felt personal, like the skirt knew i was staring
the skirt does not know you babe, relax
that is fair, but my brain zoomed in anyway, no consent
sounds like a you problem, maybe learn eye control
im trying, but the outfit has side quest energy i cant skip
thursday night. i'll pick you up
that was smooth i'll give you that
